_comment: Hand-curated overrides for enhancement-restrictions.auto.json. Same shape — keys are faction names, values are { enhancementName: restrictionObject }. A manual entry REPLACES (not merges with) the matching auto.json entry for that (faction, enhancement) pair. Use for cases the scraper/LLM can’t get right (esoteric rules text, dropped tokens that should have been kept, etc). Keep small — fix at the scraper when possible. Keys starting with ’_’ are ignored.
